items.prompt: Don't-care rows in a truth table are written as…
items.explain: X marks combinations that may be treated as 0 or 1.

items.prompt: Every SOP cover must include all…
items.explain: ON (F=1) rows must be covered; OFF rows must not.
X can enlarge groups and drop literals.

items.prompt: A product term must never include an OFF (F=0) minterm.
items.explain: Covering a hard-zero row would change the function.
